openGraph.title: Pokemon Team Builder
openGraph.ogTitle: Pokemon Team Builder - Build Teams & Analyze Weakness Coverage
openGraph.description: Pick up to 6 Pokemon to build a team and analyze your team's type weakness and resistance coverage at a glance. Save your team and share it with friends via a link.

title: Pokemon Team Builder
description: Pick up to 6 Pokemon to build a team and analyze its weakness coverage.

search.label: Add Pokemon
search.hint: Search starts after typing two or more characters.
search.empty: No results. Try a different name.
search.error: Something went wrong while searching. Please try again later.

team.heading: My Team ({{count}}/6)
team.empty: Search for Pokemon and add them to your team.
team.full: A team can hold up to 6 Pokemon.
team.duplicate: This Pokemon is already on your team.

coverage.heading: Team Weakness Coverage
coverage.description: For each attacking type, how many members are weak, resistant, or immune.
coverage.sharedDescription: Attacking types that 2 or more members are weak to at once. Cover these gaps.
coverage.emptyTeam: Add Pokemon to your team to see coverage.

save.heading: Save Team
save.needMember: Add at least one Pokemon to your team.
save.error: Something went wrong while saving. Please try again later.
save.anonymousHint: Saved even without logging in. Log in to manage it in your team list.

myTeams.heading: My Saved Teams
myTeams.empty: You have no saved teams yet.
myTeams.loginHint: Log in to manage your saved teams here.

shareView.title: Shared Pokemon Team
shareView.description: A read-only team you are viewing through a share link.
shareView.notFound: Team not found. The link may have expired or been deleted.
